source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/04_G1717CW 외 7종/90_규격 Test report/1. 신청서 및 제출서류/09. 시험신청서 - 작성 후 회신/에이치앤아비즈_ACTS-TP-04-F01(08)_시험신청서.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. submitted a test application for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides applicant, manufacturer, product, model, rating, intended sales countries, test classification, and applicable IEC standards for test and certification use.
keyPoints: Product is 의료영상획득장치 / Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Model GT1717C and family model GT1717CP differ by CsI deposition thickness: 300um and 500um.
Applicable standards listed include IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 amendments.
Application and receipt date shown as 2025-08-26.

entities.name: 한지민
entities.evidence: 담 당 자 한지민; 신청자(Name) / 서명(Signature): 한지민 /

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: 영문: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
concepts.evidence: 영문: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The document is a test application form.

evidence.evidenceText: 상기의 사항으로 시험 및 인증을 신청합니다.신청일: 2025. 08. 26.

evidence.claim: The applicant is ㈜에이치앤아비즈 / H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: 신청자(Applicant) 회사명 한글: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 영문: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product is 의료영상획득장치 / Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: 제 품 명 한글: 의료영상획득장치 영문: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The main model is GT1717C and the family model is GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: 모 델 명 GT1717C 패밀리모델 GT1717CP

evidence.claim: The intended sales countries or regions are domestic, Europe, and United States.
The difference between GT1717C and GT1717CP is internal CsI thickness with no electrical/electromagnetic impact.
evidence.evidenceText: 모델별 차이점 전기/전자파 영향이 없는 내부 CsI 두께 차이

evidence.claim: GT1717C has CsI deposition thickness of 300um and GT1717CP has 500um.
The listed applicable standards include IEC 60601-1:2005 and amendments AMD1:2012 and AMD2:2020.
The listed applicable standard includes IEC 60601-1-6:2010 with AMD1:2013 and AMD2:2020.
The document states that the information is necessary for standards certification and test reports.
evidence.evidenceText: 상기 사항은 규격 인증 및 Test Report에 사용되는 필요 정보이므로 정확히 작성하여 주시기 바랍니다.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is provided as metadata, but the source text itself lists sales countries and certification categories rather than a specific regulatory authority.
Revision/version value was inferred from the source file name segment ACTS-TP-04-F01(08), not from the body text.
Checkbox selections for test classification, certification classification, conformity statement, and consent fields are not reliably represented in the preprocessed text.
